title: Function arguments should be passed only once
description: Avoid passing the same argument multiple times to a function call.
impact: Increased complexity, possibly leading to errors
recommendation: Refactor code to avoid duplicate arguments
why_is_this_an_issue: Duplicate arguments can make the code harder to understand and maintain, and may lead to unintended consequences or errors.
how_to_fix: Refactor the code to avoid passing the same argument multiple times.
